name: file-app-template
description: Standalone Vite+React+TS+Tailwind scaffold copied by `pnpm create-file <name>` into files/<name>/. Every .tsx in src/frames/ default-exports a component and is a frame; App.tsx routes by ?frame=<Name>. Zero dependency on any studio (@ccs/*) package — see playbook §4/P0 pitfall.
